card.headline: Low overall adherence with plateaued aggregate progress; Cleaning AR protocols show persistent 0 performance despite completion.
reasons: Overall adherence is 58% (182/315 min), suggesting inconsistent home training and engagement risk.
Aggregate performance stays low (0.27–0.36) while difficulty remains low (0.05–0.08), consistent with a plateau.
Cleaning AR and Cleaning AR Vertical show 0.0 performance despite 59–81% adherence at 0 difficulty—possible task/setup barrier.

params.note: Check barriers to completing prescribed minutes and review whether current tasks are appropriately challenging.

params.reason: Repeated 0.0 performance at 0 difficulty despite moderate-high adherence suggests task/setup barrier.

checkin.wins: Tuesday you really leaned in—Memory Cards looked steadier, and you stayed with Twister and Blobs even as the games pushed you a bit harder.
checkin.to_improve: On quieter days, try a quick touch—one round of Hockey AR or Cleaning AR to keep the rhythm.
